input.prompt:
My .NET MAUI Shell app has these problems:
1. GoToAsync("productdetails") throws an exception
2. GoToAsync("//products/active") navigates but nothing visible changes
3. My app takes 3 seconds to start and I have 12 pages in Shell
What's likely wrong in each case and how do I fix them?

input.initialPrompt:
My .NET MAUI Shell app has these problems:
1. GoToAsync("productdetails") throws an exception
2. GoToAsync("//products/active") navigates but nothing visible changes
3. My app takes 3 seconds to start and I have 12 pages in Shell
What's likely wrong in each case and how do I fix them?

data.content:
Here's what's likely wrong and the fixes:

**1. `GoToAsync("productdetails")` throws an exception**

The route isn't registered. Non-visual (detail) routes must be explicitly registered:

```csharp
// In AppShell constructor or MauiProgram.cs
Routing.RegisterRoute("productdetails", typeof(ProductDetailsPage));

// Then navigate with:
await Shell.Current.GoToAsync("productdetails");
```

Only routes defined as `ShellContent`/`Tab`/`FlyoutItem` in XAML are auto-registered. Pushed pages need `Routing.RegisterRoute`.

**2. `GoToAsync("//products/active")` — navigates but nothing visible changes**

The route resolves, but the `ShellContent` has no `ContentTemplate` or `Content`, or multiple `ShellContent` items share the same `Route`. Check your XAML:

```xml
<!-- Wrong: missing template or duplicate routes -->
<Tab Route="products">
    <ShellContent Route="active" Title="Active" />
</Tab>

<!-- Fixed -->
<Tab Route="products">
    <ShellContent Route="active" Title="Active"
                  ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate local:ActiveProductsPage}" />
</Tab>
```

Also verify the page's content isn't transparent/empty and that `IsVisible="True"` on the shell item.

**3. 3-second startup with 12 pages**

Shell instantiates every page at launch unless you use `DataTemplate`. Wrap all `ShellContent` pages in `ContentTemplate` so they're created lazily:

```xml
<!-- Wrong: page created immediately at startup -->
<ShellContent Route="settings">
    <local:SettingsPage />
</ShellContent>

<!-- Fixed: page created only when navigated to -->
<ShellContent Route="settings"
              ContentTemplate="{DataTemplate local:SettingsPage}" />
```

Do this for all 12 pages. With `ContentTemplate`, Shell defers construction until the tab/page is first visited, dramatically reducing startup time.
data.reasoningText: The user is asking about three common .NET MAUI Shell navigation issues. These are well-known patterns I can answer from knowledge without needing to search a codebase. Let me provide concise, actionable answers.
